meaning: n.盛会,庆典,游行,虚饰,露天表演
examples: This was an historical pageant, representing the King's immediate progenitors.
He followed the pageant through all its devious windings about London, and all the way to Westminster and the Abbey.
The pageant broke up and grouped itself picturesquely, and remained bareheaded.
Allred would not say if her client still intended to compete in the pageant.
The format of a beauty pageant in Alderney has changed to give shy entrants more privacy.
